---
id: delete-multiple-groups
title: "Batch delete translation memory entry groups"
description: "For every entry ID in the payload, deletes the entire group that shares the same source text (and key). The request is deduplicated to distinct groups so passing multiple entries from the same row is a no-op past the first one."
sidebar_label: "Batch delete translation memory entry groups"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: api//tolgee-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Batch delete translation memory entry groups"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/v2/organizations/{organizationId}/translation-memories/{translationMemoryId}/entries"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



For every entry ID in the payload, deletes the entire group that shares the same source text (and key). The request is deduplicated to distinct groups so passing multiple entries from the same row is a no-op past the first one.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  {...require("./delete-multiple-groups.ParamsDetails.json")}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  {...require("./delete-multiple-groups.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./delete-multiple-groups.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
